---
title: "Particle Physics · Book"
lang: en
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="course-index course-subpage">
  <nav class="course-profile-links" aria-label="Book navigation">
    <a href="../../index.html">Course home</a>
    <a href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/">NeutrinoHit</a>
    <a href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/en/education.html#particle-physics-course">Course map</a>
  </nav>

  <section class="course-intro">
    <p class="course-kicker">Book EN</p>
    <h1>Particle Physics</h1>
    <p>
      English online-book scaffold for the course. The section will grow with
      lecture notes, exercises, references, and auxiliary materials.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section aria-label="Future book structure">
    <h2 class="course-section-title">Structure</h2>
    <div class="course-material-grid">
      <article class="course-material"><h3>Notes</h3><p>Chapters will be added as the lecture material is prepared.</p></article>
      <article class="course-material"><h3>Exercises</h3><p>Problems and exercises will be connected to the course structure.</p></article>
      <article class="course-material"><h3>Reference material</h3><p>Conventions, notation, formulas, and tables will be collected here.</p></article>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
